title: EspoCRM
description: Open-source CRM for sales and customer management: contacts, accounts, leads, opportunities, activities, workflows, reporting and email.
installation: Runs the official EspoCRM image (espocrm/espocrm, apache variant). EspoCRM only supports MySQL/MariaDB (no PostgreSQL) — this template ships the bundled mariadb addon (default db/user/password 'espocrm', rotate before production and keep ESPOCRM_DATABASE_PASSWORD in sync). On first boot the admin account is provisioned from ESPOCRM_ADMIN_USERNAME / ESPOCRM_ADMIN_PASSWORD — rotate ESPOCRM_ADMIN_PASSWORD (placeholder value). ESPOCRM_SITE_URL is wired to the app URL token so generated links resolve. The valkey addon is wired as an optional Redis cache backend (Valkey is Redis-compatible and password-less here) via ESPOCRM_CONFIG_USE_CACHE / the Redis host/port vars; remove it if not wanted. Persistent app data (uploads, custom code, config, extensions) lives at /var/www/html — back this up. EspoCRM needs a scheduled cron job hitting cron.php every ~1 minute; run it via an external CronJob after install. For outbound email configure SMTP from the EspoCRM admin UI.
